text.title: PMBoK 8 Focus Areas Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (framework_primary, refresh_planned, audit_pressure) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Org uses PMBoK as primary framework?

branch.question: PMBoK 8 refresh planned in next 6 months?

conclusion.verdict: apply full 5×7 focus area × domain rubric
org uses PRINCE2 / IPMA / other — different rubric applies

text.example: framework_primary=PMBoK → refresh_planned=true → apply full focus-area rubric (rule five-focus-areas-mandatory).
